description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular wooden top with a smooth, natural wood grain finish. Its most distinctive feature is the set of four elegantly curved legs, which taper gracefully toward the floor, giving the piece a refined and classic appearance. The front face includes a single drawer with a seamless, handle-less design, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The drawer is subtly integrated, with no visible hardware, maintaining the clean lines of the nightstand. The wood appears to be of medium tone, likely oak or maple, and the craftsmanship suggests a sturdy yet stylish construction. This nightstand would complement both traditional and contemporary urban interiors, offering both function and visual appeal.
description: A wooden nightstand with a single, handle-less drawer and elegantly curved legs, finished in a natural wood grain. Its minimalist design and smooth surfaces make it suitable for stylish urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer and the full curvature of the front legs.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the drawer and the elegant leg curves, with more depth visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 1, showing the drawer and the side profile of the legs.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the tabletop and the pronounced curve of the legs.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
